member.summary: Extension methods for connecting to a Kafka broker.

member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.

member.name: T:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaConsumerSettings
member.summary: Provides the client configuration settings for connecting to a Kafka message broker to consume messages.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaConsumerSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection string of the Kafka server to connect to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaConsumerSettings.Config
member.summary: Gets the configuration settings for the Kafka consumer.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaConsumerSettings.DisableMetrics
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry metrics are enabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaConsumerSettings.DisableHealthChecks
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the Kafka health check is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaConsumerSettings.DisableTracing
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

member.name: T:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaProducerSettings
member.summary: Provides the client configuration settings for connecting to a Kafka message broker to produce messages.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaProducerSettings.ConnectionString
member.summary: Gets or sets the connection string of the Kafka server to connect to.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaProducerSettings.Config
member.summary: Gets the configuration settings for the Kafka producer.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaProducerSettings.DisableMetrics
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry metrics are enabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaProducerSettings.DisableHealthChecks
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the Kafka health check is disabled or not.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.KafkaProducerSettings.DisableTracing
member.summary: Gets or sets a boolean value that indicates whether the OpenTelemetry tracing is disabled or not.

member.name: T:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.MetricsChannel
member.summary: Metrics are emitted using json data published by librdkafka StatisticsHandler (see https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/clients/confluent-kafka-dotnet/_site/api/Confluent.Kafka.ConsumerBuilder-2.html#Confluent_Kafka_ConsumerBuilder_2_StatisticsHandler) The is written by both StatisticsHandler of and and aims to avoid slowing down 's consume thread and 's poll thread by offloading the processing of the json. The json processing is performed by .

member.name: T:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.Statistics
member.summary: Maps to the JSON output returned by the librdkafka statistics API.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.StatisticsJsonSerializerContext.Statistics
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.StatisticsJsonSerializerContext.Int64
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.StatisticsJsonSerializerContext.String
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.StatisticsJsonSerializerContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:Aspire.Confluent.Kafka.StatisticsJsonSerializerContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: M:Aspire.HealthChecksExtensions.TryAddHealthCheck(Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting.IHostApplicationBuilder,Microsoft.Extensions.Diagnostics.HealthChecks.HealthCheckRegistration)
member.summary: Adds a HealthCheckRegistration if one hasn't already been added to the builder.

member.name: T:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard
member.summary: Methods for guarding against exception throwing values.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNull(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrEmpty(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or empty.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNullOrWhitespace(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is null or whitespace.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfZero(System.Int32,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is zero.
member.param: The message to use in the thrown exception.
The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfInvalidTimeout(System.Int32,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not considered a valid timeout.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Int32,System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfOutOfRange(System.Double,System.String,System.Double,System.Double,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not within the given range.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
The name of the lower bound.
The name of the upper bound.
An optional custom message to use in the thrown exception.

member.name: M:OpenTelemetry.Internal.Guard.ThrowIfNotOfType``1(System.Object,System.String)
member.summary: Throw an exception if the value is not of the expected type.
member.param: The parameter name to use in the thrown exception.
member.typeparam: The type attempted to convert to.
member.returns: The value casted to the specified type.

member.name: T:Confluent.Kafka.InstrumentedConsumerBuilder`2
member.summary: A builder of with support for instrumentation.

member.name: M:Confluent.Kafka.InstrumentedConsumerBuilder`2.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A collection of librdkafka configuration parameters (refer to https://github.com/edenhill/librdkafka/blob/master/CONFIGURATION.md) and parameters specific to this client (refer to: ). At a minimum, 'bootstrap.servers' must be specified.

member.name: M:Confluent.Kafka.InstrumentedConsumerBuilder`2.Build
member.summary: Build a new IConsumer instance.
member.returns: an .

member.name: T:Confluent.Kafka.InstrumentedProducerBuilder`2
member.summary: A builder of with support for instrumentation.

member.name: M:Confluent.Kafka.InstrumentedProducerBuilder`2.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.KeyValuePair{System.String,System.String}})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
member.param: A collection of librdkafka configuration parameters (refer to https://github.com/edenhill/librdkafka/blob/master/CONFIGURATION.md) and parameters specific to this client (refer to: ). At a minimum, 'bootstrap.servers' must be specified.

member.name: M:Confluent.Kafka.InstrumentedProducerBuilder`2.Build
member.summary: Build a new IProducer instance.
member.returns: an .
